title: Digital Angle Finder Ruler, 200mm/7 Inch Protractor Angle Measure Tool with LCD Display for Woodworking Construction Repairing (Black)
features: 【Robust Angle Finder】Constructed with premium nylon fiberglass, our digital angle finder is designed for durability, offering scratch-resistant, deformation-proof performance and a comfortable grip. It's compact, lightweight, and portable.Measuring length: 0-200mm.
【LCD Display】Featuring an expansive LCD screen, this angle finder provides sharp, instantaneous readings. The laser-engraved scale ensures long-term clarity, maintaining visibility without fading.

【Precise Measurement Tool】Boasting ±0.1° accuracy and 0.05° resolution, this angle measurement tool angles from 0-360° with a compact folded length of 7.9 inches / 200mm and a full length of 15.7 inches / 400mm. For accurate results, align the ruler horizontally and reset to zero before each measurement.

【Extended Battery Life】 This digital protractor relish extended use with a CR2032 battery that offers over 2000 hours of runtime. The auto-power off after 6 minutes conserves battery life, while laser-engraved scales promise enduring scale legibility.

【Versatile Application】Our digital angle gauge is equipped for both linear and angular measurements in metric and imperial units. It's essential for woodworking, furniture making, construction, and DIY projects, including precise angle cuts for cornices, skirting, and more.
